CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-12-2010 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-09-2010 Continued To Oct-22-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212

Notice And Motion To Transfer Action And Request For Attys' Fees
Off Calendar Aug-05-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS:
DEFENDANT STOCKTON UNIFIED SCHOOL DISTRICT'S Motion To Transfer Action And Request For Attorney Fees is granted; the court can reach this motion given the prior court's determination that the issue was not before it and Section 394 mandates trial in a neutral county. The case is transferred to Alameda county. Moving party is to submit a proposed form of order. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR # 8189 =301/pjb

Notice And Motion To Transfer Action And Request For Attys' Fees
Off Calendar Jul-14-2010 Continued To Aug-05-10 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 301
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Furah Faruqui, Esq. of Edrington, Schirmer & Murphy, 925-827-3300 for defendant and moving party Stockton Unified School District
Andew Meisel, Esq. of Meisel & Krenta, 415-788-2035 for plaintiff and oppisng party, Jian Al Chen

RULING:
ARGUED and the Court continued DEFENDANT STOCKTON UNIFIED SCHOOL DISTRICT'S Notice And Motion To Transfer Action And Request For Attorneys' Fees to AUGUST 5, 2010. OPENING SUPPLEMENTAL BRIEFS DUE ON 7/23/10 TO BE FILED AND SERVED BY FAX. RESPONSIVE BRIEFS DUE ON 7/29/10 TO BE FILED AND SERVED BY FAX. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR # 8189 (301/PJB)
